title: Viners Barware Bottle Stopper
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Our stylish and modern bottle stopper can be used to keep your wine and other drinks sealed after opening, keeping the contents fresher for longer. Elegantly and expertly crafted, making them the perfect barware accessory

MULTI-PURPOSE STOPPER | This bottle stopper is versatile and reusable. With its triangular shape, the rubber sealing rings will create an airtight seal on a variety of different bottle shapes. The spherical grip make it easy to pull and remove.

MADE TO LAST | This bottle stopper is made to last. This bottle stopper has built-in strength and durability that ensures it will last for years to come. Hand wash only and avoid the use of abrasive sponges.

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools needed to professionally entertain guests at home, from bottle storage, to cocktail shakers, buckets, and straws.

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from the finest quality materials.
description: From the manufacturer Clamp Bottle Stopper Waiter's Friend Ice Tongs Single Wall Ice Bucket Champagne Bottle Stopper Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.5 out of 5 stars 162 4.0 out of 5 stars 29 3.7 out of 5 stars 9 4.0 out of 5 stars 1 Price £9.30 £ 9 . 30 £4.00 £ 4 . 00 £2.25 £ 2 . 25 £8.75 £ 8 . 75 £4.20 £ 4 . 20 Description The Viners lever-arm bottle stoppers are designed to keep wine bottles airtight. A secure way to seal unfinished bottles on most neck sizes. Featuring a handy integrated crown cap bottle opener at the end of the lever arm. The double-lever hinge easily extracts the cork from the bottle in two swift steps. The neat, retractable blade removes foil protection from bottles. It also features a handy, easy to open bottle cap remover. Deluxe brushed stainless steel ice serving tongs, with ridged edges for a secure grip on ice cubes or fruit. This versatile ice bucket is great for holding ice or storing freshly prepared fruits. Finished in high quality stainless steel, this bucket will add style and elegance to your barware collection. The champagne stopper has a push down and wing type mechanism which creates an airtight seal. Designed to maintain the fizz and bubbles in unfinished sparkling wines and champagne.
